items.title: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio meets PM Modi
items.summary: Secretary of State Rubio, accompanied by U.S. Ambassador to India Sergio Gor, discussed U.S.-India ties on security, trade and critical technologies with Mr. Modi

items.title: Israeli air strike pounds southern Lebanon leaving many injured
